name: Steamed Ancient Egg Diamonds
recipeIngredient: 1 Preserved ancient egg, cleaned, shelled and diced
1 Salted duck egg, hard-cooked, shelled and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine fresh eggs with hot water and peanut oil in a bowl. Mix in the diced preserved ancient egg and salted duck egg.
2. Place the mixture into a shallow, oiled heatproof dish.
3. Steam over gently boiling water for 15 minutes or until the eggs are set.
4. Allow the dish to cool before placing it back into the dish.
5. Cut into small diamond shapes.
6. Garnish with coriander and serve with preserved ginger and slivered green onions.
Note: If serving as a main dish, increase the amount of water to 1 cup.
